message:
type: PROPOSE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
note: I'm implementing graded relevance support for NDCG metric in metrics.py. Let me know your files so we can confirm no overlap.

type: PROPOSE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
note: My task: fix NDCG IDCG calculation to use len(expected_ids) instead of min(len(retrieved_ids), len(expected_ids)) in the NDCG.compute method (lines ~380-386). This is a small, localized change. If your feature also touches metrics.py, let me know which class/lines you need so we can split cleanly or I can do both edits.

type: REVISE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
note: Our changes both hit NDCG.compute in the same file/method, so a clean file-level split isn't possible. Proposal: I'll implement my relevance_scores feature AND fold in your IDCG fix (len(expected_ids) instead of min(len(retrieved_ids), len(expected_ids))) as part of the same edit, since with graded relevance the IDCG calc needs to reference expected_ids/relevance_scores directly anyway. I'll credit/preserve your fix exactly as described. If that works, reply ACCEPT and I'll proceed; otherwise let me know a different split.

type: REVISE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
your_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
note: We have a real overlap: both features touch NDCG.compute() in the same file/method. Mine is tiny: change 'ideal_length = min(len(retrieved_ids), len(expected_ids))' to just 'ideal_length = len(expected_ids)' (lines ~380-386), so idcg is computed over ALL expected relevant docs, not capped by retrieved count. Please paste your exact intended diff for the graded-relevance change so I can merge them manually into one coherent compute() method and we avoid a git conflict later. I'll apply the merged result on my branch; happy to have you do it instead if easier - your call, just confirm who applies the combined edit.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: none
your_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
note: Accepted. You own llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py and will fold in my IDCG fix (ideal_length = len(expected_ids), not min(len(retrieved_ids), len(expected_ids))) alongside your graded-relevance work. I won't edit this file. Ping DONE when ready; I'll merge your branch and verify the IDCG fix is present before finalizing my patch.txt.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
your_files: none
note: Confirmed, I own metrics.py and will fold in your IDCG fix. Implementing now.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: none
your_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
note: ACCEPT - looks correct, idcg now iterates over len(expected_ids) which fixes my bug. Go ahead and apply. Ping DONE when pushed so I can merge team/agent2 and verify.

type: DONE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
your_files: none
note: Implemented: NDCG.compute now accepts relevance_scores dict for graded relevance, and I folded in your IDCG fix (idcg now sums over len(expected_ids) items via the ideal-ranked relevance list, not capped by min with retrieved_ids). Heads up: this fix causes llama-index-core/tests/evaluation/test_metrics.py::test_ndcg Case 4 ('More relevant docs than retrieved', expected_ids=[id1..id4], retrieved_ids=[id1,id2], expected 1.0) to fail, since it encoded the old capped-IDCG behavior. Per my instructions I'm not modifying test files unless explicitly asked - since this is your bug-fix's behavior change, wanted to flag it so you can update that test's expected value on your end if your task allows it. New correct expected value for Case 4 with linear mode: dcg=(1/log2(2)+1/log2(3)), idcg=(1/log2(2)+1/log2(3)+1/log2(4)+1/log2(5)) -> score ≈ 0.6366824387328317.

type: DONE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
your_files: none
note: Pushed to team/agent2 (commit 2c1816f0f). NDCG.compute now supports relevance_scores for graded relevance and includes your IDCG fix. Note: tests/evaluation/test_metrics.py::test_ndcg Case 4 will fail against new correct behavior (old test asserted the capped-IDCG bug) - I did not touch test files per my constraints, let me know if you're updating that test on your end.

type: DONE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
your_files: none
note: Finalized. team/agent1 already matches team/agent2 (commit 2c1816f0f) - no further merge needed, your branch was fast-forwarded onto mine. patch.txt built from team/main..HEAD and confirmed. Reminder: test_metrics.py::test_ndcg Case 4 still fails since it encodes pre-fix behavior - left test files untouched per my constraints, your call if you want to update it in your own patch.
